{{Quote|Thanks to what the Remnant has provided, we now have routes into and out of the Deep Core that the Vong haven't explored. Insertion points from Empress Teta; exit points up and down the Ag Circuit.|[[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Turk Brand|Brand]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>}}
The '''Agricultural Circuit''', often shortened to '''Ag Circuit''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The Circuit connected several [[Agriworld/Legends|agricultural worlds]] located in the Core, of which [[Salliche/Legends|Salliche]] was the most prominent and powerful producer. Many planets on the route were members of the farming corporation [[Salliche Agricultural Corporation|Salliche Ag]].

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Turk Brand]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] noted that [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] information provided by the [[Imperial Remnant]] would allow them to use exit points all along the Ag Circuit in the approach to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], leading to the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar|final battle]] of the war.
